prompt:
Square fantasy RPG skill icon in the style of a dark AAA action-RPG skill icon set (like Diablo / Path of Exile / Lost Ark skill icons). Low-key painterly digital painting, dramatic chiaroscuro. The subject FILLS THE ENTIRE SQUARE FRAME edge to edge, emerging from a solid deep near-black background with a subtle dark radial vignette in the corners. Strong colored energy glow radiating from the center — sickly violet-and-ember light.

Subject: a grimy medieval baker's clenched fist crushing a handful of blighted, spurred rye — dark purple-black ergot fungus horns bursting from golden wheat between the fingers, a poisonous violet-green haze of spores, and a hot ember-orange glow of St. Anthony's Fire igniting at the crushed grain. Rot, plague, 13th-century grimness.

Muted palette of ash-black, wheat-gold, rot-purple, with a searing violet-and-orange glow as the focal light source. High detail, rich brushwork, soft rim light on the knuckles, cinematic and moody. Centered emblem composition. NO text, NO border or ornate frame, NO UI chrome, NO empty margins — the art bleeds to all four edges of the square.
